note: Initial seed — covers roughly the last 30–90 days for breadth. Art is a quieter beat than music or data; daily runs may often be sparse.

items.title: "Neverness To Everness" launch ignites AI-art controversy in 24 hours
items.summary: Game shipped April 29 amid allegations of AI-generated assets. Hotta Studio silent. The workflow-vs-final-output question keeps recurring.

items.title: Midjourney V8 Alpha ships, V8.1 already in preview
items.summary: V8 launched March 17 with ~5x faster generation, native 2K via --hd, and better text rendering. V8.1 already in alpha.midjourney.com preview.

items.title: Codrops: WebGL for designers, not just engineers
items.summary: Long-form tutorial on shader-driven browser graphics aimed at designers rather than engineers. Worth a Sunday afternoon.

items.title: Verse × EXPANDED.ART: Generative Abstraction and Beyond, Part III
items.summary: Third installment of the algorithm-and-code abstraction survey. Both in-person (Berlin) and online — long-form generative plus open editions.
